title: rubus sudrei
intro: Rubus sudrei, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of fever and cough. The health benefits of Rubus sudrei include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus sudrei include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
